name: Mark Feldman
abstract: Mark Feldman (born 1955 in Chicago) is an American jazz violinist.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Blue Note Sings and Swings, Part 2
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: John Abercrombie
about_quotes.evidence: I’m trying to organize three separate things... trying to get four of us together to commit to like two periods of time... Mark Feldman on violin.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Abercrombie interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Wall and Adam Nussbaum
about_quotes.evidence: The last record we did actually was I think John wrote maybe everything on the record the thing with Lovano and Kenny Wheeler and Mark Feldman.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Wall and Adam Nussbaum interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001
